privacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy
intro: Menhausen ("we," "us," or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting the anonymity of users ("you") who access our mental well-being mini-application via Telegram (the "Service").
This Privacy Policy outlines what data we collect (if any), how we use it, and your rights regarding that data.

noPii.title: 1. No Personally Identifiable Information (PII)
paragraphs: We designed Menhausen with anonymity as a core value. By default, we do not collect or store any personally identifiable information (PII) such as your name, email address, phone number, or IP address.
bullets: No sign-up is required to use the Service.
You are identified only by a random session token (non-persistent) within the Telegram environment.
You may optionally choose to connect a TON wallet or donate using crypto or fiat. This is strictly optional and anonymized to the extent possible.

dataCollection.title: 2. Data We May Collect (Anonymous Only)
paragraphs: To improve your experience and app functionality, we may collect and process the following non-personal and aggregated information:
All such data is collected without linkage to any identity and is stored securely using industry standards.
bullets: Anonymous interaction history (e.g., which cards you've opened)
Mood check-in data (non-identifying)
Session events (e.g., clicks, duration)
Device/browser type
Encrypted TON wallet address (if connected)

telegramIntegration.title: 3. Telegram Integration
paragraphs: As a Telegram Mini App, Menhausen operates within the Telegram ecosystem.
bullets: Telegram may process basic metadata (user ID, app usage time), subject to their Privacy Policy.
We do not share any collected user data with Telegram or third parties unless required by law.
We do not access your Telegram messages, contacts, or phone number.

contact.title: 4. Contact Information
paragraphs: For questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact: support@menhausen.com

privacyPolicy.closing: By using Menhausen, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to this Privacy Policy.

termsOfUse.title: Terms of use
termsOfUse.warning: PLEASE READ THESE TERMS CAREFULLY BEFORE USING THIS SERVICE.
termsOfUse.intro: These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Menhausen (the "Service"), a self-help digital platform designed to support mental well-being. By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree with these Terms, please do not use the Service.

legalDisclaimer.title: 1. Legal Disclaimer — No Medical Advice
paragraphs: Menhausen is not a medical or psychiatric service. The content provided through the Service, including interactive cards, mood tracking, and exercises, is intended for informational and self-reflective purposes only.
Use of the Service is at your own risk.
bullets: The Service does not diagnose, treat, or cure any mental health condition.
We are not licensed therapists, clinicians, or healthcare providers.
If you are experiencing a mental health crisis, suicidal thoughts, or any other medical emergency, please seek immediate help from a qualified healthcare professional or call emergency services.

noWarranty.title: 2. No Warranty or Guarantee of Outcomes
paragraphs: Menhausen makes no representations or warranties about the effectiveness, accuracy, or outcomes of using the Service. We do not guarantee:
All materials are provided "as is", without warranties of any kind, express or implied.
bullets: any improvement in your mental or emotional state,
any relief from psychological distress,
any behavioral or lifestyle change.

eligibility.title: 3. Eligibility
paragraphs: To use the Service, you must:
bullets: be at least 18 years old;
reside in a jurisdiction where the use of such services is legally permitted;
not use the Service in violation of any applicable law or regulation.

privacy.title: 4. Privacy and Anonymity
paragraphs: We respect your privacy. We do not collect personally identifiable information unless explicitly provided by you. The Service is designed to operate anonymously.

contact.title: 5. Contact Information
paragraphs: For questions or concerns about these Terms, please contact: support@menhausen.com

termsOfUse.closing: By using Menhausen, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to these Terms of Use.
